items.title: Beyond Binary Edits Robust Multimodal Knowledge Editing with Adversarial Subspace Alignment
items.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) need efficient mechanisms to update knowledge without degrading existing capabilities. While intrinsic multimodal knowledge editing achieves strong reliability and locality, it often exhibits limited generality, failing to propagate edits across semantically equivalent visual and linguistic variations. This issue arises from the lack of explicit semantic supervision, rigid editing scopes, and biased anchoring to individual samples in high-dimensional multimodal spaces. We address robust intrinsic multimodal knowledge editing by explicitly targeting generalization. We formalize robustness through knowledge units that group semantically equivalent multimodal inputs and define generality as consistent predictions within each unit. To expose fragile semantic regions, we introduce Latent Adversarial Robustification (LAR), which generates adversarial yet semantically coherent variants in the joint latent space. We further propose Rank-Constrained Subspace Learning (RCSL), enforcing low-rank alignment of adversarial representations at the edit layer via a singular value-based objective. Extensive analysis demonstrates the effectiveness of ASAM empirically.
items.llm_evidence_en: robust multimodal knowledge editing with adversarial subspace alignment to update knowledge in MLLMs
items.llm_evidence_cn: 通过对抗子空间对齐实现鲁棒的多模态知识编辑，以更新多模态LLM中的知识
items.llm_evidence: 通过对抗子空间对齐实现鲁棒的多模态知识编辑，以更新多模态LLM中的知识
items.canonical_evidence: 通过对抗子空间对齐实现鲁棒的多模态知识编辑，以更新多模态LLM中的知识
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a knowledge editing method that groups semantically equivalent multimodal inputs into knowledge units and aligns subspaces adversarially to improve generalization.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 多模态大语言模型在编辑知识时往往泛化不足，无法将修改传递到语义等价的视觉和语言变体。论文将鲁棒性形式化为知识单元，并定义泛化为同一单元内的跨模态一致性，然后通过对抗子空间对齐使编辑在语义等效输入间传播，提升内在知识编辑的通用性。实验显示该方法在保持可靠性和局部性的同时显著改善了泛化，为MLLM的精准知识更新提供了新手段。
items.llm_tldr: 多模态大语言模型在编辑知识时往往泛化不足，无法将修改传递到语义等价的视觉和语言变体。论文将鲁棒性形式化为知识单元，并定义泛化为同一单元内的跨模态一致性，然后通过对抗子空间对齐使编辑在语义等效输入间传播，提升内在知识编辑的通用性。实验显示该方法在保持可靠性和局部性的同时显著改善了泛化，为MLLM的精准知识更新提供了新手段。

items.title: Beyond Semantic Dominance: Cognitive Affective Reasoning and Empathetic Response Alignment in Audio Language Models
items.abstract: While Audio Language Models (ALMs) demonstrate strong semantic understanding, they struggle with complex affective interactions. Specifically, textual semantic dominance often overshadows acoustic nuances, and a lack of cognitive depth leads to generic, emotion-agnostic responses. We propose CogAudio-LLM\footnote{ \urlstyle{same} https://github.com/zxzhao0/CogAudio-LLM, a novel cognitive affective reasoning framework. To mitigate semantic dominance, we build LIME-440K, a ``lexically-identical, multi-emotion'' dataset designed to facilitate acoustic-semantic decoupling. We introduce EIPS, a 4-step Chain-of-Thought (CoT) mechanism incorporating psychological reasoning. For inference efficiency, multi-stage training explicitly establishes EIPS via supervised fine-tuning, then distills this logic into an implicit generation process. Finally, we design DR-SAPO (Dual-Route Soft Adaptive Policy Optimization) to dynamically balance the logical rigor of the CoT with the empathetic quality of the direct response.
items.llm_evidence_en: CogAudio-LLM integrates 4-step psychological reasoning CoT, injecting emotional knowledge into audio LMs
items.llm_evidence_cn: CogAudio-LLM集成了四步心理学推理思维链，将情绪知识注入音频语言模型
items.llm_evidence: CogAudio-LLM集成了四步心理学推理思维链，将情绪知识注入音频语言模型
items.canonical_evidence: CogAudio-LLM集成了四步心理学推理思维链，将情绪知识注入音频语言模型
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes CogAudio-LLM with a 4-step CoT incorporating psychological reasoning and a multi-emotion dataset LIME-440K for acoustic-semantic decoupling, achieving more empathetic responses in ALMs
items.llm_tldr_cn: 为解决音频语言模型中文本语义主导导致忽略声学情感线索、以及认知深度不足产生情感无关回应的问题，本文提出CogAudio-LLM框架。其核心包括构建词汇相同而情绪不同的LIME-440K数据集以实现声学-语义解耦，以及设计EIPS四步思维链机制整合心理学推理过程。多阶段训练策略提升推理效率。实验表明，该框架能产生更具共情性和情感一致性的回应，显著优于现有音频语言模型，推动了理性与感性结合的音频理解研究。
items.llm_tldr: 为解决音频语言模型中文本语义主导导致忽略声学情感线索、以及认知深度不足产生情感无关回应的问题，本文提出CogAudio-LLM框架。其核心包括构建词汇相同而情绪不同的LIME-440K数据集以实现声学-语义解耦，以及设计EIPS四步思维链机制整合心理学推理过程。多阶段训练策略提升推理效率。实验表明，该框架能产生更具共情性和情感一致性的回应，显著优于现有音频语言模型，推动了理性与感性结合的音频理解研究。
items.matched_query_text: Methods for injecting emotional knowledge from psychology theories into neural networks

items.title: EPIG: Emotion-Based Prompting for Personalised Image Generation
items.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved impressive results in synthesizing high-quality images from natural language prompts. However, commonly used prompting strategies remain relatively generic, limiting the model's ability to accurately express emotional intent and nuanced affective attributes. This work proposes EPIG, a method that enhances emotional expressiveness at the prompt level prior to image generation. Grounded in psychologically informed emotion representations (valence-arousal) and leveraging structured, role-aware prompt enrichment, EPIG enriches emotion-related components of prompts without modifying or retraining the image generation backbone. The resulting emotion-aware prompts guide the generative process toward more emotionally coherent visual outputs, with particular effectiveness in controlling arousal. EPIG is lightweight, training-free, and well suited for resource-constrained and personalized image generation scenarios. Experimental results on a benchmark of 10 diverse prompts show that EPIG reduces mean arousal error compared to strong baselines, including naive insertion and LLM-based prompt expansion, with reductions of 14% and 12%, respectively. These improvements are statistically significant. EPIG also preserves valence alignment and semantic consistency, as measured by CLIPScore and supported by ablation studies. The effect is more pronounced on prompts containing explicit subjects such as humans, children, or animals, where the reduction reaches 17%, highlighting the subject-sensitive behavior of the proposed method.
items.llm_evidence_en: EPIG enriches prompts with valence-arousal psychological representation, injecting emotional knowledge into image generation
items.llm_evidence_cn: EPIG利用效价-唤醒度心理表征丰富提示，将情绪知识注入图像生成模型
items.llm_evidence: EPIG利用效价-唤醒度心理表征丰富提示，将情绪知识注入图像生成模型
items.canonical_evidence: EPIG利用效价-唤醒度心理表征丰富提示，将情绪知识注入图像生成模型
items.llm_tldr_en: Proposes EPIG, a prompting method that enhances emotional expressiveness in diffusion models using valence-arousal based enrichment, guiding coherent emotion-aware image generation
items.llm_tldr_cn: 针对文本到图像扩散模型常用提示策略表达情感意图不足的问题，本文提出EPIG，一种基于情感的心理提示增强方法。该方法以心理学动机的效价-唤醒度情感表征为基础，通过结构化、角色感知的提示丰富手段，在不修改模型的情况下将情感知识注入图像生成过程。实验显示，EPIG能引导生成更符合情感意图且情绪连贯的图像，提升了个性化图像生成的情感表现力，为情感计算与生成模型的结合提供了轻量级范式。
items.llm_tldr: 针对文本到图像扩散模型常用提示策略表达情感意图不足的问题，本文提出EPIG，一种基于情感的心理提示增强方法。该方法以心理学动机的效价-唤醒度情感表征为基础，通过结构化、角色感知的提示丰富手段，在不修改模型的情况下将情感知识注入图像生成过程。实验显示，EPIG能引导生成更符合情感意图且情绪连贯的图像，提升了个性化图像生成的情感表现力，为情感计算与生成模型的结合提供了轻量级范式。

items.title: PALoRA: Projection-Adaptive LoRA for Preserving Reasoning in Large Language Models
items.abstract: Efficiently updating Large Language Models (LLMs) with new or evolving factual knowledge remains a central challenge, as even parameter-efficient adaptation can erode previously acquired reasoning abilities. This tension reflects a plasticity-stability dilemma: models must incorporate new knowledge while preserving skill-critical representations. In this work, we study this trade-off through the spectral structure of multilayer perceptron weight matrices. We show, both theoretically and empirically, that information essential for reasoning is not localized only in dominant singular directions, but is instead distributed across the singular spectrum. Motivated by this observation, we introduce PALoRA, a two-stage framework for knowledge injection with reduced interference. PALoRA first trains a Singular Value Fine-Tuning (SVF) expert on a reasoning dataset and uses its learned singular scaling vector as a frozen geometric probe to identify components that are critical for the target skill. It then performs factual knowledge injection with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) under a structural orthogonality constraint, ensuring that updates avoid the identified skill-relevant subspace. Across Llama 3.1 8B and Mistral 7B, and across mathematical, coding, and scientific reasoning benchmarks, PALoRA preserves on average 95% of the SVF expert's reasoning performance while maintaining competitive factual recall. It consistently improves skill retention over prior spectral Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods while adding less than 0.006% parameter overhead.
items.llm_evidence_en: PALoRA is a parameter-efficient framework for injecting factual knowledge into LLMs without degrading reasoning abilities.
items.llm_evidence_cn: PALoRA是一种参数高效框架，用于向大语言模型注入事实知识而不损害推理能力。
items.llm_evidence: PALoRA是一种参数高效框架，用于向大语言模型注入事实知识而不损害推理能力。
items.canonical_evidence: PALoRA是一种参数高效框架，用于向大语言模型注入事实知识而不损害推理能力。
items.llm_tldr_en: PALoRA is a parameter-efficient framework that injects knowledge into LLMs while preserving reasoning by adaptively projecting updates, avoiding the plasticity-stability trade-off.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 针对大语言模型知识更新中推理能力易受损的问题，本文提出PALoRA框架。通过分析MLP权重矩阵的频谱结构，发现推理关键信息并非仅集中在主导奇异方向，而是散布全谱，因此PALoRA采用投影自适应低秩适应来保护这些成分。实验表明，PALoRA在注入新事实知识的同时有效保持模型推理能力，缓解了可塑性-稳定性矛盾。该方法为持续知识注入提供了稳健的解决方案。
